'''Kordu''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Kordu sector/Legends|Kordu sector]]. The [[Ratter thist|Kriss]] were native to the planet.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
